fields.label: Default dashboard
fields.rationale: Global singleton: setting is_default=1 on a new Dashboard automatically clears is_default on every OTHER Dashboard on the site (controller runs an UPDATE tabDashboard SET is_default=0). Enable only when this should be the new default for all users.

fields.label: Standard
fields.rationale: 0 = site-local. 1 requires developer_mode + module. A standard Dashboard can ONLY reference standard Dashboard Charts / Number Cards - mixing a standard Dashboard with a non-standard chart is rejected at validate().

fields.label: Module (required if is_standard=1)
fields.rationale: Required only when is_standard=1. Empty for site-local dashboards.

fields.label: Number Cards (list of Number Card names)
fields.rationale: Optional list of Number Card names to render alongside charts. Empty for chart-only dashboards. If the user named cards that don't exist yet, emit the Number Card changeset items BEFORE the Dashboard so link references resolve on apply.

fields.label: Global chart options (JSON)
fields.rationale: Optional JSON string of rendering defaults merged into every chart when the dashboard renders (e.g. '{"height": 300}'). Must parse as JSON - the controller rejects invalid JSON at save. Empty means each chart uses its own options.
